text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 
77 
MDCR_DIB_PRMRY_IMPRMNT_CD 
LABEL: 
Medicare — SSA Disability Insurance Benefit Dx Primary Impairment Code 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the disability primary impairment diagnosis code from the Social Security 
Administration (SSA). The SSA groups diagnoses into categories. 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
4 
SOURCE: 
CMS SSA tables 
VALUES: 
0001–9999 (e.g., 2960,) or null/missing 
COMMENT: 
Note that these are not ICD-10 (or
